sipoc.Input: Inspection reports, log data from vibration monitors, material usage records.
Process: Review current lubrication schedule for the induction coils.
Compare against best practices (e.g., 30% oil level, regular change intervals).
Output: Update and implement new maintenance schedule with detailed instructions on how to perform each step.

title: Perform Cleaning of Air Cooling Bed Fans and Rollers

sipoc.Input: Tool kit, cleaning solution, fan filters (for 4 × 15 kW fans).
Process: Disassemble and clean the fans with a brush or vacuum cleaner.
Output: Logs updated to record cleaning actions performed.
Fans cleaned to improve efficiency and reduce wear and tear on components.

title: Perform Rolling Bearings Inspection and Re-chroming if Necessary

sipoc.Input: Inspectors, new bearings (for 6-roll straightener), old bearings.
Process: Check all rolls for wear using microscopes and measuring tools.
Output: Logs updated to track any re-chroming operations performed.
Old bearings sent to supplier for refurbishment if necessary, new ones installed or replaced as required.

title: Perform Megger Tests on Main Motor and Verify Induction Coil Health

Process: Perform a megger test on the main motor using a Megger tester.
Use the same Megger tester to check for insulation resistance in the induction coils.
Output: Logs updated with results of both tests performed, showing no faults detected in equipment health.

title: Implement New Lubrication Schedule and Update Induction Coil Log Book

sipoc.Input: Previous log entries from the induction coil section, updated lubrication schedule.
Process: Review and update previous log entries to show new maintenance frequency.
Output: New schedule added to log book for easy reference and future comparisons.

title: Monitor Overhead Hood System and Bag Filter Performance

sipoc.Input: Observation of hood performance, filter logs.
Process: Monitor the hood's efficiency against standards to ensure proper containment.
Output: Logs updated with results indicating whether system needs adjustments or further maintenance.

title: Perform Root Cause Analysis to Identify Failure Mode 'FM-305 Cooling Bed Roller Seize'

sipoc.Input: Inspection reports, log data from the cooling bed roller system, equipment history.

Process: Review logs and observations for patterns indicating failures in the rolling bearings of the entry/exit roller tables.
Analyze historical records to identify when and where this issue first appeared within the plant.
Conduct interviews with maintenance personnel to gather detailed information about common issues encountered.
Output: Report submitted, including a detailed analysis and recommendations for preventive measures based on the findings.
